text.title: Data Analysis — Requirements Discovery and Quality Assessment Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the data-analysis methodology end-to-end.

step.name: identify-data-needs
step.action: List the data elements the answer would require; reject decorative requests.

step.name: define-data-elements
step.action: Per-element row: name, type, source, scope, owner.

step.name: build-data-model
step.action: Conceptual → logical → physical ER snapshot; tag bounded contexts.

step.name: assess-quality
step.action: Score 6 dimensions (accuracy, completeness, consistency, timeliness, validity, uniqueness); flag below threshold.

step.name: extract-rules
step.decision-gate: Validate against the output contract before declaring done; if invalid, loop back to the failing step.
